insight: Given that you've just started with one session completed, the fact that you've already established a 1-day streak shows that you're taking immediate action, and now it's time to build on that momentum by focusing on specific areas where you can improve from your current 20% average score. To boost your progress, try to identify one key concept or question type from your last session where you scored 20% and make a plan to review and practice it every day for the next few days to see tangible improvement.

alerts.msg: Last score was 20%. Agent recommends reviewing before continuing.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
